```python
import urllib.request
import json

# 尝试直接访问 FND 投资者关系页面获取Q4 2024财报
urls = [
    "https://investor.flooranddecor.com/news-and-events/press-releases",
    "https://www.floordesignstockroom.com/newsroom", 
    "https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/FND/"
]

for url in urls:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36'})
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) as response:
            html = response.read().decode('utf-8')
            # 搜索同店销售相关关键词
            if 'same-store' in html.lower() or 'sssg' in html.lower() or 'q4 2024' in html.lower():
                print(f"Found relevant content in: {url}")
                print(html[:2000])
                break
            else:
                print(f"URL: {url} - no Q4 2024 data found in first 2000 chars")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error accessing {url}: {e}")
